name: GOLFTEC Cherry Creek
address: 3773 Cherry Creek Dr N UNIT 130, Denver, CO 80209
about: GOLFTEC Cherry Creek is a golf training facility specializing in data-driven lessons and club fittings. The venue utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching. Services include golf lessons, club fittings, and practice memberships aimed at improving a player's swing and on-course performance. The environment is designed for focused skill development with access to indoor simulator bays and training bays equipped with feedback technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized game plans based on swing data analysis
Access to launch monitors and video feedback for measurable improvement
Professional PGA coaching with a focus on long-term progress

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides equipment for lessons and fittings, though many students prefer to use their own clubs for consistency.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at GOLFTEC Cherry Creek, so outside food and drinks likely are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on training and practice rather than full 18-hole simulator rounds, so this time is not specified.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior coaching programs and technology suitable for young golfers, though specific kid-friendly amenities are not detailed.
